questions.prompt: AI Receptionist Monthly Quota Pack minutes that go unused at the end of the month roll over and add to next month's available pack.
questions.explanation: Monthly Quota Packs are use-it-or-lose-it. Unused minutes do not roll over. If a customer is consistently using less than half their pack, drop the pack size and rely on plan-included minutes plus the one-time addon for spikes.

questions.prompt: Which statement about Hosting User capacity allocation is correct?
choices: Hosting User capacity is reserved on the form but only deducted from the MSP pool when the Hosting User actually creates their first PBX.
Hosting User capacity is deducted from the MSP pool the moment you save the Create Hosting User form, regardless of whether they have created any PBXs yet.
Hosting User capacity floats, meaning their PBXs draw from the MSP pool directly until the per-PBX cap is reached.
Hosting User recording minutes can be reduced down at any time to reclaim them for the MSP pool.
questions.explanation: Allocations are immediate reservations: capacity leaves the MSP pool the moment you save, whether the Hosting User has created PBXs or not. Recording minutes specifically are one-way; the Update User Subscription endpoint forbids reducing totalRecordings.
